attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 51 answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation)

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00011, derived from source AUC-011) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-MH-01 bucket.

Source note describes in-person administration of oral olanzapine and a formal mental state/neurological examination; presentation layer de-anchored to family-reported content only, with the examination findings sealed into 11 and olanzapine explicitly NOT carried into 12 as patient/family-directed medication, since psychotropic administration requires an in-person clinician.

psychosocial_profile.health_anxiety_level enum does not have an altered-insight/not-applicable option for acute psychosis; conservatively set to "high" to reflect the family/patient distress level, though this is an imperfect fit given the patient lacks capacity for typical health-anxiety framing — flagged for schema maintainers to consider an additional enum value.
Vitals were clinician-measured in person and were not placed in 01.objective_data_offered — omitted rather than fabricated.
Exact age not stated in source; a plausible young-adult age (29) consistent with first-episode psychosis epidemiology was assigned as a conservative placeholder.
No guideline references were cited in the source note; guideline_references left as an empty array.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
